title: ephemerantha denigrata
side_effects: Ephemerantha denigrata can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and swelling. Furthermore, Ephemerantha denigrata can interact with certain medications, potentially causing adverse effects like dizziness, fatigue, and changes in blood pressure. Prolonged use or overdose of the plant can also lead to more severe consequences, including organ damage and even respiratory failure.
